bean_name.zh: 哥伦比亚 路易斯·阿尼巴尔 帕帕约

story.zh:
磨粉后干香就有很强烈的甜香，冲煮后入口即有强烈甜感。

在口腔中呈现奶油般饱满丝滑的质地，温度下降后泛出莓果的微酸，尾韵持久，整体十分愉悦。
story.en:
Even the dry grounds smell intensely sweet, and that sweetness lands the instant it touches your lips.

The body is full and silky — almost creamy. As it cools a gentle berry tartness emerges and the finish lingers. A thoroughly delightful cup.

method.zh: 泰摩冰瞳 / Origami · 1:16（烘焙 6 周内），1:15（6 周后）· 96°C
method.en: TIMEMORE Icicle / Origami · 1:16 (within 6 wks of roast), 1:15 (after) · 96°C

summary.zh: 成熟水果的甜，奶油般饱满浓厚的口感。
summary.en: Ripe-fruit sweetness with a full, creamy, weighty mouthfeel.

notes.zh: 惠兰（Huila）位于哥伦比亚南部，高海拔、火山土壤，是公认的精品产区，咖啡以明亮甜感与饱满果味著称。本豆来自生产者 Luis Anibal 的 Villa Betuli 庄园，帕帕约（Papayo）品种，日晒处理。
notes.en: Huila, in southern Colombia, is a celebrated specialty region — high altitude and volcanic soils give its coffees bright sweetness and full fruit. This lot is from producer Luis Anibal's Villa Betuli farm: Papayo varietal, natural process.

story.zh:
干香是浓郁的莓果和花香，热水一冲整个房间都甜了。

入口明亮多汁，蓝莓和草莓的酸甜很跳，尾段有淡淡的红茶感，干净利落。
story.en:
Dry aroma bursts with berries and florals — the whole room sweetens on the pour.

Bright and juicy up front, vivid blueberry-strawberry acidity, finishing on a light black-tea note. Clean and crisp.

summary.zh: 明亮莓果酸、花香突出、轻盈干净。
summary.en: Bright berry acidity, floral, clean and light.

notes.zh: 古吉位于埃塞俄比亚南部，高海拔、昼夜温差大，盛产花香与莓果调性突出的水洗与日晒处理咖啡。
notes.en: Guji, in southern Ethiopia, sits at high altitude with big diurnal swings — known for washed and natural coffees with pronounced floral and berry character.
